col_3: Reflec coating on the hull increases the ship’s armor against lasers by 3. Adding Reflec costs MCr0.1 per ton of hull and can only be added once.
A self-sealing hull automatically repairs minor breaches such as micrometeoroid impacts, and prevents hull hits from leading to explosive decompression. It costs MCr0.01 per ton of hull.

Stealth armor applies a dice modifier (DM) penalty to the party attempting to detect the stealthed ship. The DM penalty is calculated as twice the difference in technology level (TL) between the sensor ship and the stealth ship, plus an additional 2. For example, if a TL9 sensor ship is trying to detect a stealth ship with TL10 armor, the DM penalty would be -4
